title: Management Occupations
description: Plan direct or coordinate activities of organizations or departments.

title: Computer and Information Systems Managers
description: Plan direct or coordinate activities in such fields as electronic data processing.

title: Business and Financial Operations Occupations
description: Work as analysts and specialists in business operations.

title: Market Research Analysts and Marketing Specialists
description: Research conditions in local regional or national markets.

title: Computer and Mathematical Occupations
description: Workers who apply mathematical or computing principles to solve problems.

title: Computer Occupations
description: Workers who design develop test and maintain software and computer systems.

title: Computer Systems Analysts
description: Analyze science engineering business and other data processing problems.

title: Computer and Information Research Scientists
description: Invent and design new approaches to computing technology.

title: Computer Network Support Specialists
description: Analyze test troubleshoot and evaluate existing network systems.

title: Computer Network Architects
description: Design and implement computer and information networks.

title: Computer Programmers
description: Create modify and test the code and scripts that allow computer applications to run.

title: Software Developers
description: Research design and develop computer and network software or specialized utility programs.

title: Software Quality Assurance Analysts and Testers
description: Develop and execute software tests to identify software problems.

title: Web Developers
description: Design create and modify Web sites.

title: Web and Digital Interface Designers
description: Design digital user interfaces or websites.

title: Data Scientists
description: Develop and implement a set of techniques or analytics applications.

title: Educational Instruction and Library Occupations
description: Workers who teach students or provide library services.

title: Computer Science Teachers Postsecondary
description: Teach courses in computer science.

title: Healthcare Practitioners and Technical Occupations
description: Workers who diagnose and treat patients.

title: Registered Nurses
description: Assess patient health problems and needs develop and implement nursing care plans.

title: Nurse Practitioners
description: Diagnose and treat acute episodic or chronic illness.
